goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'london kings cross' and should 'arrive by 16:00'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'train ID', and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to london kings cross and should arrive by 16:00
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on thursday
Make sure you get travel time, train ID, and price
